Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.RestResponse

Packages that use RestResponse
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
Mocked REST client and supporting classes for in-JVM testing built on the classic Apache HttpClient API.

    Method
    Description
    <T> RestResponse
    ResponseHeader.as(Holder<T> value, Class<T> type)
    Same as ResponseHeader.as(Class) but sets the value in a mutable for fluent calls.
    <T> RestResponse
    ResponseHeader.as(Holder<T> value, Type type, Type... args)
    Same as ResponseHeader.as(Type,Type...) but sets the value in a mutable for fluent calls.
    <T> RestResponse
    ResponseHeader.as(Holder<T> value, ClassMeta<T> type)
    Same as ResponseHeader.as(ClassMeta) but sets the value in a mutable for fluent calls.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.assertContent(String value)
    Provides the ability to perform fluent-style assertions on this response body.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.assertContentMatches(String value)
    Provides the ability to perform fluent-style assertions on this response body.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.assertStatus(int value)
    Provides the ability to perform fluent-style assertions on the response status code.
    RestResponse
    ResponseHeader.asString(Holder<String> value)
    Same as BasicHeader.asString() but sets the value in a mutable for fluent calls.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.cacheContent()
    Caches the response body so that it can be read as a stream multiple times.
    RestResponse
    RestRequest.complete()
    Same as RestRequest.run() but immediately calls consume() to clean up the response.
    RestResponse
    RestResponse.consume()
    Consumes the response body.
    protected RestResponse
    RestClient.createResponse(RestRequest request, HttpResponse httpResponse, Parser parser)
    Creates a RestResponse object from the specified HttpResponse object.

    Logs a message.

    Pipes the contents of the response to the specified output stream.

    Pipes the contents of the response to the specified writer.

    Pipes the contents of the response to the specified writer.

    Returns the response that created this object.

    Returns the response that created this object.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.test.assertions.FluentStringAssertion<RestResponse>
    RestResponse.assertCharset()
    Provides the ability to perform fluent-style assertions on the response character encoding.
    FluentResponseBodyAssertion<RestResponse>
    RestResponse.assertContent()
    Provides the ability to perform fluent-style assertions on this response body.
    FluentResponseHeaderAssertion<RestResponse>
    RestResponse.assertHeader(String name)
    Provides the ability to perform fluent-style assertions on a response header.
    FluentResponseStatusLineAssertion<RestResponse>
    RestResponse.assertStatus()
    Provides the ability to perform fluent-style assertions on the response StatusLine object.
    Future<RestResponse>
    RestRequest.completeFuture()
    Same as RestRequest.complete() but allows you to run the call asynchronously.
    Future<RestResponse>
    RestRequest.runFuture()
    Same as RestRequest.run() but allows you to run the call asynchronously.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    RestClient.onCallClose(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Interceptor method called immediately after the RestRequest object is created and all headers/query/form-data has been set on the request from the client.
    protected void
    RestClient.onCallConnect(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Interceptor method called immediately after an HTTP response has been received.
    void
    BasicRestCallInterceptor.onClose(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
     
    void
    RestCallInterceptor.onClose(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Called when the response body is consumed.
    void
    BasicRestCallInterceptor.onConnect(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
     
    void
    RestCallInterceptor.onConnect(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Called immediately after an HTTP response has been received.
